commit.message:
fix: Telegram bot improvements — inspect, dedup, context (#54)

* fix: handle Anthropic tool_use finish_reason in agent loop

The agent loop checked for finish_reason == "tool_calls" (OpenAI
format) but Anthropic returns "tool_use". This caused the loop to
break after round 1 without processing tool results, producing
empty responses ("no response generated").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /inspect command to Telegram bot

Shows tool actions, sources, and timing from the last query.
Also captures statuses, sources, and perf_trace events from
the chat SSE stream for inspection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent duplicate Telegram messages from Claude Code sessions

[NOTIFY] messages were sent during assistant events AND re-extracted
from the result event, causing duplicates. Now skips re-extraction
when notifications were already sent during the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: detect imperative follow-ups for conversation context retention

"look in my email", "check my calendar", "search drive for it" etc.
were not recognized as follow-ups, so the previous question's context
was lost. Added regex pattern for imperative verbs + data source nouns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add tests for PR review findings; strip PII from /inspect

- Add unit tests for expand_followup_query imperative patterns
- Add tests for orchestrator notification dedup (notifications_sent > 0)
- Move _IMPERATIVE_FOLLOWUP_RE to module level per convention
- Strip tool input args from /inspect output (show tool name only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Fix corrupted localStorage keys from UTC date bug

Add one-time migration that shifts any future-dated history entries back
by 1 day. For NYC (UTC-5), check-ins after 7pm local were stored under
tomorrow's UTC date, causing buttons to appear pre-checked the next day.
Migration runs on startup and is a no-op once data is clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix stale APY blind spot, add brain cost cap awareness, API timeout

- Fix current pool APY refresh: search ALL cached pools instead of
  filtered candidates. If current pool APY drops below MIN_APY, it
  disappeared from candidates and never got refreshed — brain was
  making decisions on stale data in exactly the scenario where
  accurate data matters most.
- Pass bridge cost cap (MAX_BRIDGE_COST_PCT) to brain context so it
  knows about the hard limit and avoids recommending moves that will
  be silently blocked.
- Add 45s timeout on anthropic API call to prevent blocking the
  entire cycle on a slow response.
- 64 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 3-step generation pipeline + accent-aware voices (v0.12.2)

Major rewrite of listening_generator.py:
- Step 1: generate_metadata() — pure Python randomization (120 topics,
  speaker roles, accent, complication, numerical ranges). Zero cost.
- Step 2: _generate_transcript(metadata) — focused GPT call for transcript only
- Step 3: _generate_questions(metadata, transcript) — GPT call for questions
  with full transcript context for better accuracy

Also includes accent-aware TTS voice selection: metadata.accent drives
voice pair/solo voice selection instead of random. British, Australian,
American accents with vocabulary hints in transcript prompt.

Validation loop retained (up to 3 retries with fresh metadata each time).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix load balancer: remove worker.conf conflict, rebalance workers

Root cause: nginx/conf.d/worker.conf was loaded on Server 1 alongside
api.conf, creating a competing server block on port 80 that routed ALL
traffic to the local API only — bypassing the load balancer entirely.
Server 2 was idle while Server 1 was at 100% CPU (load avg 674).

Fixes:
- Move worker.conf out of conf.d/ so Server 1 only loads api.conf
- Reduce Server 1 from 35→15 API workers (it also runs PG+Redis+nginx)
  15×2 OMP = 30 cores for API, leaving ~50 for PG/Redis/nginx/OS
- Weight upstream: Server 1 weight=1 (15 workers), Server 2 weight=2
  (35 workers) — sends ~67% of traffic to the dedicated API server

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
security: validate approval address, add RPC URLs, gas estimation, received amount verification

- Validate approvalAddress matches known LI.FI diamond before approving
  ERC20 spend (prevents compromised API from draining tokens)
- Add missing RPC URLs for Fantom, zkSync, Linea, Scroll (11/11 chains
  now covered — was 7/11, blocking TX execution on 4 chains)
- Add eth_estimateGas fallback with 20% buffer when quote lacks gasLimit
  (complex multi-hop routes can exceed the 500k hardcoded default)
- Verify received amount on destination chain after bridge completion
  in LIVE mode (uses actual on-chain balance instead of estimate)
- Add security invariant tests: RPC/diamond/USDC coverage parity
- 64 tests passing

Add Supabase integration for cloud persistence

- Add @supabase/supabase-js client with graceful fallback to localStorage
- Create unified storage layer (src/lib/storage.ts) with batch load/save
- Update App.tsx and RadiologyTemplatesPage to use new storage layer
- Add SQL schema for Supabase app_data table (key-value document store)
- Add .env.example documenting required environment variables

When VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY are set, data syncs
to Supabase with localStorage as offline cache. Without them, the app
works exactly as before using localStorage only.

Fix daily reset bug: use local date instead of UTC in getTodayKey

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: strict CBR bitrate, veryfast preset, TEST_BLACK_SECONDS

- BITRATE_V 4500k→5500k, BUFSIZE=maxrate (5500k) para CBR real
- x264-params: nal-hrd=cbr:force-cfr=1:filler=1 (elimina picos >6Mbps)
- preset superfast→veryfast (melhor qualidade com CPU aceitável)
- TEST_BLACK_SECONDS: limita leitura HLS para testar fallback de tela preta

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: canvas@next (v3) にアップグレードし Bun 互換化 (#90)

* fix: canvas@next (v3) にアップグレードし node-canvas-webgl を削除

prismarine-viewer が require('canvas') する際、canvas@2 は NAN ベースの
ため Bun で動作しない。N-API ベースの canvas@3 (canvas@next) に
アップグレードすることで Bun 互換性を確保し、MCP サーバーの
exit code 127 クラッシュを解消する。

node-canvas-webgl は screenshot 機能廃止に伴い未使用かつ
canvas@2 に依存するため削除。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: STATUS.md に canvas@3 移行を反映、Containerfile コメント修正
